info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  yaNlugantasya 'carkarItam' iti saMjYA prAcInEH AcAryEH prayuktA asti tasyAH eva prayogaH asmin gaRasUtre kftaH asti  etAdfSAnAM yaNlugantaDAtUnAm samAveSaH adAdigaRe Bavet - iti spazwIkartum atra idaM gaRasUtraM sTApitam asti  anena sarveByaH yaNlugantaDAtuByaH prakriyAyAm Sap-vikaraRaM kftvA tasya luk karaRIyaH - iti prakriyAviSezaH spazwI kriyate
